description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. These brown leather sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans, to shorts and skirts. The leather panels with the cut outs are perfect for everyday wear.UpperWoven leather band on the forefootLeather heel cup with square perforations for ventillation and added styleElastic band attached to the heel cup for a snug FitSoft leather lining for added comfortCushioned footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and flower heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
